hooks.command: uv self update 2>/dev/null; uv sync --all-extras 2>/dev/null; npm install -g markdownlint-cli2 2>/dev/null; uv run playwright install --with-deps webkit 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff format --check src/ tests/ scripts/ && uv run ruff check src/ tests/ scripts/ && uv run mypy src/ && uv run pytest && markdownlint-cli2 '**/*.md' && uv run yamllint sample_config/ docker-compose*.yml
